episodes.title: Inside the Maniac Murder Cult
episodes.description:
The Maniac Murder Cult is one of the most disturbing internet cult cases in recent years. Federal prosecutors say alleged leader Michail Chkhikvishvili, also known as “Commander Butcher,” promoted a neo-Nazi extremist ideology, recruited others to commit hate crimes, and plotted mass-casualty violence targeting Jewish people and racial minorities. In this video, we break down the arrest, extradition, charges, guilty plea, and the terrifying allegations at the center of the case.

#TrueCrime #Cult #ManiacMurderCult #CommanderButcher #MidnightFiles
